{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged gray madra
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Underlord]] wore plates of [[Forged gray madra]] over his entire body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
